list.title: Projects
list.subtitle: Group related chats under one umbrella

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.body: Create a project to keep related chats, their workspace and knowledge together. Any backend, model or assistant can run inside it.

modal.workspaceHint: Optional. Chats in this project start here, and a .wayland/ knowledge folder is created so every chat shares the same context.

workspace.emptyTitle: No chats in this project yet
workspace.emptyBody: Start a chat with any backend, model or assistant. It will live under this project, and you can run as many as you like at once.

assign.title: Add to project
assign.empty: You don't have any projects yet. Create one below.

delete.title: Delete project?
delete.body: Delete "{{name}}"? Its chats are kept and simply removed from the project.

removeChat.title: Remove from project?
removeChat.body: The chat itself is kept; it is just detached from this project.

toast.saveFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
